name: social-engagement-team
description: Social media engagement automation and growth strategy team focusing on safe interaction automation, AI comment operations, signal mining, and brand monitoring

displayDescription.en: Safe and efficient social media engagement growth through interaction automation, AI comment operations, signal mining, and brand monitoring across 14+ platforms.
displayDescription.zh: 通过智能化互动自动化、AI评论运营、高转化信号挖掘和品牌舆情监控，安全高效提升社交媒体互动效果，覆盖14+全球主流平台

defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me create a safe and effective social media engagement growth strategy
defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我制定一套安全高效的社媒互动增长策略

quickPrompts.en: Help me create a safe and effective social media engagement growth strategy
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我制定一套安全高效的社媒互动增长策略

quickPrompts.en: Analyze comments on my account to find users with purchase intent
quickPrompts.zh: 分析我账号下的评论，找出有购买意向的用户

quickPrompts.en: Monitor competitor brand mentions and discussion hotspots across platforms
quickPrompts.zh: 监控竞品品牌在各平台的声量和讨论热点
